raw.message: Probiere den Long Nugget Burger! Jetzt nur noch bis zum 27.04. für nur 2,99 € – nur in der BK App.

hook.summary: Fast-paced reveal of a Burger King Long Nugget Burger deal with vibrant yellow and red graphics.
hook.visual_action: The burger is displayed while a yellow flame background and price tag pop into view.
hook.text_overlay: Jetzt holen! Nur für kurze Zeit. Auch als Plant-based* LONG NUGGET BURGER FÜR NUR 2.99€

scene_flow: Static shot of the Long Nugget Burger on a light background with promotional text.
Dynamic transition to a bright yellow background with a stylized flame graphic.
Product name 'LONG NUGGET BURGER' and price '2.99€' appear prominently.
Final frame holds on the complete offer with legal disclaimers at the bottom.
audience_proxy: Value-conscious fast food consumers in Germany looking for a quick deal.
